title: 3 Pack Kids Toothbrush Set Medium Bristles Gentle On Gums | Easy Grip Handles for Confident Brushing | Bright Colours Encourage Healthy Habits | Strong Suction Base | Suitable for Children Aged 3+

features: Designed For Little Smiles – Specially made for children aged 3 and above with small brush heads that clean effectively while being gentle on young teeth and gums.
Easy Grip For Confident Brushing – Ergonomic handles provide a strong and comfortable hold, helping kids learn to brush independently with better control.
Medium Firm Bristles – Offers the perfect balance of softness and strength for removing plaque without hurting sensitive gums.
Bright Colours, Healthy Habits – Fun, colourful designs make brushing exciting and encourage kids to build positive daily dental care routines.
Strong Suction Base – Stands upright for easy storage, keeping the brush clean, dry, and ready for everyday use.
description: Product Description Make brushing fun and easy for your child with this 3 pack of colourful kids toothbrushes. Designed for ages 3 and up, each brush features medium bristles for effective cleaning, soft grips for confident handling, and a suction base for hygienic storage. Gentle on gums, strong on plaque, and perfect for daily use. Safety Warning Choking hazard - Not suitable for children under 3 years. Do not use for purposes other than oral hygiene.
